message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>
                  The avalanche of genomic data generated from the SARS-CoV-2 virus requires the development of tools to detect and monitor its mutations across the world. Here, we present a webtool,
                  <jats:italic>coronapp</jats:italic>
                  , dedicated to easily processing user-provided SARS-CoV-2 genomic sequences and visualizing current worldwide status of SARS-CoV-2 mutations.
                </jats:p>
                <jats:p>The webtool allows users to highlight mutations and categorize them by frequency, country, genomic location and effect on protein sequences, and to monitor their presence in the population over time.</jats:p>
                <jats:p>
                  The tool is available at
                  <jats:ext-link xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" ext-link-type="uri" xlink:href="http://giorgilab.unibo.it/coronapp/">http://giorgilab.unibo.it/coronapp/</jats:ext-link>
                  for the worldwide dataset and at
                  <jats:ext-link xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" ext-link-type="uri" xlink:href="http://giorgilab.unibo.it/coronannotator/">http://giorgilab.unibo.it/coronannotator/</jats:ext-link>
                  for the annotation of user-provided sequences. The full code is freely shared at
                  <jats:ext-link xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" ext-link-type="uri" xlink:href="https://github.com/federicogiorgi/giorgilab/tree/master/coronapp">https://github.com/federicogiorgi/giorgilab/tree/master/coronapp</jats:ext-link>
                </jats:p>
                <jats:sec>
                  <jats:title>Data Availability Statement</jats:title>
                  <jats:p>
                    The data that support the findings of this study derive from the GISAID consortium and are openly available in Github, in Rdata format for the R environment, in files results.rda and metadata.rda, at the following link:
                    <jats:ext-link xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" ext-link-type="uri" xlink:href="https://github.com/federicogiorgi/giorgilab/tree/master/coronapp/data">https://github.com/federicogiorgi/giorgilab/tree/master/coronapp/data</jats:ext-link>
                  </jats:p>
                </jats:sec>
title: coronapp : A Web Application to Annotate and Monitor SARS-CoV-2 Mutations

reference.article-title: Clinical Characteristics of Coronavirus Disease 2019 in China
